criteria.name: root_cause_identification
criteria.description: Did the agent correctly identify the root cause of the issue?

criteria.name: reasoning_chain
criteria.description: Is the reasoning from symptoms to root cause clear and logical?

criteria.name: scope_accuracy
criteria.description: Does the plan correctly scope the fix without unnecessary changes?

examples.notes: Human-reviewed strong plan reference for rubric calibration.
Human-reviewed weak plan showing scope drift and shallow reasoning.
